S.FORM: ===== Takaray a sowal ===== o fawahan hananay i, adihay ko imi nona tilid, o picomodan no marorayay a matayal masaromi'ad a tamdw a minokay, roma sa i ,o kahadakan a malingad no laloma'an. Ano awa ko fawahan i,awa ko picomodan no minokayay, awa ko pahiceraan no tamdaw, itini to a malaholhol ko laloma'an.
S.PHON: ===== takaraj a so~uwa…æ ===== o~u fawaƒßan ƒßananaj i, a…¨~…Æiƒßaj ko~u imi no~una ti…æi…¨~…Æ, o~u pi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…Æan no~u maro~urajaj a mataja…æ masaro~umi °a…¨~…Æ a tam…¨~…Æw a mino~ukaj, ro~uma sa i ,o~u kaƒßa…¨~…Æakan a ma…æi≈ãa…¨~…Æ no~u …æa…æo~uma °an. ano~u awa ko~u fawaƒßan i,awa ko~u pi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…Æan no~u mino~ukajaj, awa ko~u paƒßi ¶…ôraan no~u tam…¨~…Æaw, itini to~u a ma…æaƒßo~u…æƒßo~u…æ ko~u …æa…æo~uma °an.
S.FORM: ===== Takaray a sowal ===== o fawahan hananay i, adihay ko imi nona tilid, o picomodan no marorayay a matayal masaromi'ad a tamdw a minokay, roma sa i ,o kahadakan a malingad no laloma'an. Ano awa ko fawahan i,awa ko picomodan no minokayay, awa ko pahiceraan no tamdaw, itini to a malaholhol ko laloma'an.
